name: Busy Day Chicken & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease the bottom of a 13"x9"x2-inch pan evenly with oleo.
3. Spread rice evenly over the bottom of the pan.
4. Arrange chicken pieces on top of the rice.
5. Dot the chicken pieces with remaining oleo.
6. Sprinkle onion soup mix over all ingredients in the pan.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Pour boiling water into the pan until it covers everything.
9. Bake for 1 hour. If a browner color is desired, brown the chicken pieces before placing them on top of the rice.
